case_title: ON24, INC VS. MARKETING WITH ATTITUDE, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION PAPERS ON RESPONDENT (TRANSACTION ID # 57297743) FILED BY PETITIONER ON24, INC

Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Margaret Crawford, of Seubert French Frimel & Warner LLP, Tel. 650.322.3048, for petitioners, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER ON24, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/SRB)
